title: Hi, I’m Jiyoung.
text:
Hi, I’m Jiyoung.
I am a data-driven Finance & Strategy professional and CPA, currently pursuing an M.S. in Business Analytics at UC San Diego.
I am passionate about leveraging data to improve financial performance, optimize operations, and support strategic decision-making.
Outside of work, I enjoy swing dancing, tennis, running, and golf.

title: Experience
text:
Business Operation Manager (FP&A, Strategy) Jul 2024 – Jun 2025
Cost Control Lead, Gas Field Development Project (EPCIC) Jan 2021 – Jun 2024
Trade Finance Associate Mar 2020 – Dec 2020
Enterprise Risk Analyst (Credit Risk, Operations) Mar 2014 – Feb 2020
Enterprise Risk Management Intern Jun 2013 – Oct 2013
